summary: The user is planning to host a game night and seeks snack ideas and game recommendations. They recently hosted a game night featuring Ticket to Ride and are interested in introducing Pandemic, a cooperative game, to their friends. The user also inquired about resources to improve their strategy gaming skills and expressed interest in learning about Scythe.
facts: The user hosted a game night last weekend where they played Ticket to Ride. The user is considering hosting another game night soon. The user is interested in train-themed snacks for their game night, particularly "Railway Rails." The user is planning to introduce the game Pandemic at their next game night. Pandemic is suitable for 2-4 players and takes 30-60 minutes to play. The user is looking for online resources and YouTube channels to improve their gameplay skills. The user is considering learning about the game Scythe but has been advised to start with simpler games first. The user has expressed a desire to learn more about strategy games.
